facebook.caption: 4.8 stars. 655 reviews. On Bãi Trường, one of Phu Quoc's longest beaches. Soul Boutique Hotel Phú Quốc is the kind of place that shows up in every 'where should I stay' thread, and the reviews back it up. Boutique scale means actual service, not a number at a 300-room resort. Book it before the algorithm catches on. Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Walking into Soul Boutique Hotel Phú Quốc and the Bãi Trường beachfront is literally right there. 4.8 stars across 655 reviews. This is what a well-rated boutique stay actually looks like in Phu Quoc.
